title: linaria supina subsp. melanantha
intro: Linaria supina subsp. melanantha, also known as the melanantha toadflax, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, primarily due to its alkaloids and flavonoids, which have been used to treat various health issues. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, Linaria supina subsp. melanantha is used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, to promote relaxation and relieve symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
